benefits.description: KLOW helps a lot with inflammation from torn rotator cuff

side_effects.description: No noticeable difference in skin or hair from KLOW

protocol_notes: Uses KLOW himself for torn rotator cuff. Wife had breast cancer 6 years ago and is cancer-free; uses topical GHK-cu for her instead of KLOW. Will not let wife use KLOW or GH secretagogues due to cancer history. Notes TB-500 in KLOW may create better environment for cancer growth.
